metadata.name: White Caves Tenancy Knowledge Base
metadata.reviewNote: Curated operating summaries for implementation. Legal sign-off required before production go-live.

rules.title: 90-day rent increase notice window
rules.citation: Mandatory notice period for rent increase discussions and renewal changes.
rules.summary: If rent is being increased on renewal, notice should be served at least 90 days before the renewal date.

rules.title: RERA tiered rent increase formula
rules.citation: RERA increase brackets based on how far current rent is below market rent.
rules.summary: Allowed increase is typically 0%, 5%, 10%, 15%, or 20% depending on the gap between current rent and estimated market rent.

rules.title: Shared housing permit and occupant registration
rules.citation: Shared housing requires a permit and all occupants must be registered in Ejari.
rules.summary: Where shared housing applies, the property should carry a valid permit and every occupant should be reflected in Ejari records.

rules.title: 12-month notarized eviction notice for personal use
rules.citation: Personal-use eviction should be supported by 12 months notice through a notarized channel rather than WhatsApp or email.
rules.summary: For personal-use recovery, notice should be notarized and sent at least 12 months before the expected handover/end date.
